title: Middleware blocks non-admin access to /admin routes
description: Verify that middleware properly enforces role-based access control by denying access to /admin routes for users without the admin role and allowing access for admin users.

steps.description: Attempt to access /admin route as a user with 'student' role
Verify access is denied or redirected to an error or home page
Attempt to access /admin route as a user with 'admin' role
Verify access is granted and the admin page is displayed

title: Server actions require proper authentication and authorization
description: Check that all server actions (including login, change password, progress marking, onboarding actions) enforce authentication and role-based authorization.

steps.description: Call server action endpoint without any authentication token
Verify request is rejected with an authentication error
Call server action endpoint with authentication token of a user with insufficient privileges
Verify request is rejected with authorization error
Call server action endpoint with authentication token of a properly authorized user
Verify request completes successfully

title: Prevent Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) in user resource access
description: Verify that server actions correctly validate user identity and resource ownership preventing users from accessing or modifying resources that do not belong to them.

steps.description: Send a request to update user profile or progress with an authenticated user but specifying another user's userId
Verify the server rejects the request with an authorization or validation error
Send a request to mark content completed or submit quiz result with mismatched userId
Verify the server rejects the request
Send valid requests where userId matches authenticated user
Verify the requests succeed

title: No supabase-admin clients or secrets exposed in client-side code
description: Verify that no supabase-admin client instances or secrets are included or accessible in any frontend or client bundle.

steps.description: Perform static analysis and bundle inspection on the client-side code
Confirm that no supabase-admin client instances or secrets appear in the client code bundles
Attempt to access supabase-admin client functionality from client runtime
Verify such attempts fail or are not possible

title: User data responses exclude sensitive fields
description: Verify that user data sent to the frontend carefully excludes sensitive fields such as raw passwords, other users' emails, and internal metadata.

steps.description: Fetch user data from any server API or server action response
Confirm the response does not contain raw passwords
Confirm the response does not include emails of other users
Confirm the response does not expose internal metadata fields

title: Login API rate limiting and successful authentication
description: Verify successful login with correct credentials and enforce rate limiting on failed login attempts.

steps.description: Submit login request with valid username and password
Verify response redirects to dashboard or change-password page
Submit multiple login requests with invalid passwords exceeding rate limit threshold
Verify rate limiting error is returned

title: Change Password API validates password strength and confirmation
description: Verify that the change password API enforces password strength rules and matches new_password and confirm_password fields before accepting the change.

steps.description: Submit change password request with new_password and confirm_password that do not match
Verify error response indicating passwords do not match
Submit change password request with weak new_password
Verify error response indicating password strength requirements not met
Submit change password request with strong matching passwords
Verify response redirects to home or success confirmation

title: Courses API returns valid course list filtered by semester
description: Verify /api/courses GET endpoint returns a valid list of courses filtered by the specified semester query parameter and handles invalid requests gracefully.

steps.description: Send GET request to /api/courses with valid semester query parameter
Verify response contains array of courses for the specified semester
Send GET request to /api/courses with missing or invalid semester parameter
Verify response is handled gracefully with error or fallback

title: Progress Tracking API enforces ownership and returns correct status
description: Verify marking lessons/quizzes as completed and submitting quiz results validate the requesting user's identity matches resource ownership and return appropriate success or error responses.

steps.description: Send markContentAsCompleted request with authenticated user and valid contentId and contentType
Verify response indicates success or already completed
Send markContentAsCompleted request with mismatched or invalid user context
Verify request is rejected
Submit submitQuizResult request with valid quizId, scorePercentage, and authenticated user
Verify response awards XP and confirms success
Submit submitQuizResult request with mismatched user context
Verify request is rejected

title: Onboarding API completes user onboarding with GPA validation
description: Verify that completing onboarding via the API validates GPA input and updates user state correctly.

steps.description: Send completeOnboarding request with valid GPA value and authenticated user
Verify response confirms successful onboarding completion
Send completeOnboarding request with invalid GPA values (e.g. negative or too high)
Verify appropriate validation error is returned
Send completeOnboarding request without authentication
Verify request is rejected due to missing authentication
